ground_truth.title: Memberships - Yoga Prices - Center For Yoga
ground_truth.main_content: Pricing and Membership options at Center For Yoga. In Studio Pricing: Monthly Membership at $180/month for those practicing 2x/week or more with 3-month commitment, unlimited access to 75+ weekly classes, retail discounts, 14 yearly guest passes, referral discounts, workshop discounts, and optional mat & towel add-ons. Annual Membership at $2,040/year with unlimited classes and benefits. Fitness Room Membership at $75/month where strength meets serenity with unlimited access. Fitness Annual Membership at $799/year. Livestream Pricing: CFYLA Livestream Membership at $108/month with free access to 100+ interactive classes via Zoom, cancel anytime after 3-month commitment. 30-Day Membership at $119 for 30 days with access to 160+ classes. 10 Class Pack at $149 for 10 classes with 3-month expiration. Class Packs: Single Class at $35 per class, drop-in access to all in-studio yoga and fitness classes. Multiple class pack options available at discounted rates. No Commitment options available.
with: Monthly Membership at $180/month for those practicing 2x/week or more with 3-month commitment
Unlimited access to 75+ weekly classes with retail discounts, 14 yearly guest passes, referral discounts, workshop discounts
Annual Membership at $2,040/year with unlimited access to all classes and member benefits
Livestream Membership at $108/month with free access to over 100 interactive classes via Zoom
Cancel any time after the initial three-month commitment for livestream membership
